expectations.text: Research document covers navigation-related files (NavigationContext, Sidebar, TopBar, AppShell, or equivalent routing components)
expectations.evidence: Document covers all 14 skills, 25 commands, 12 agents, SKILL.md routing, spectrum.sh navigation, and the full phase transition chain — these ARE the navigation/routing components in this plugin.

expectations.text: Document includes file:line references, not just file names
expectations.evidence: Code References section includes file:line references like 'skills/prism/SKILL.md:39-44', 'scripts/spectrum.sh:181-197', 'skills/prism-research/SKILL.md:1-5', etc.
Frontmatter date is 2026-03-08 and topic is 'Navigation System in the Prism Plugin'. Document itself doesn't show filename but the format matches the convention.

Output is in the eval outputs directory (with_skill/outputs/research.md), not explicitly saved to .prism/shared/research/. The document mentions 'Step 7 (Save Findings): Saved to this document' but doesn't confirm the .prism/shared/research/ path.

expectations.text: Document has required sections: Research Question, Summary, Files Discovered, Component Analysis
expectations.evidence: All four sections present: 'Research Question' at top, 'Summary' section, 'Files Discovered' table, and extensive 'Component Analysis' with 9 subsections.

expectations.text: No improvement suggestions or critiques appear (documentarian principle)
expectations.evidence: Document only describes what exists (how navigation works, what patterns are used) without suggesting improvements or critiquing the architecture.
